name: Gesahni Bridge
description: OpenClaw market tools backed by Gesahni bridge endpoints, including preview-confirm writes for alerts and option watch rules.

baseUrl.description: Gesahni base URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:8000

readBridgeToken.description: Service token sent as Authorization: Bearer <token>

writeBridgeToken.description: Write token for confirm-stage mutations (Authorization: Bearer <token>)

defaultTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds for bridge calls
